Moringa Powder

Pure leaf powder from Gorkha, Nepal

Organic Moringa Powder

Our powder is made from hand-harvested moringa leaves, shade-dried, and stone-ground for a smooth, nutrient-rich blend.

500 g Pack USD 15 Gorkha Origin
Order on WhatsApp View All Products
Product Specs

At a Glance

Net Weight500 g
PriceUSD 15
Suggested Use1 tsp daily
FormatFine powder
SourceGorkha, Nepal
ProcessingShade-dried leaves
How to Use

Simple Daily Routine

Morning Smoothie

Blend one teaspoon into banana, mango, or green smoothies for an easy nutrition boost.

Warm Water Mix

Stir into warm water with lemon and honey for a quick morning drink.

Food Add-On

Mix into soups, oats, sauces, or yogurt without changing your meal routine.

FAQs

Powder Questions

What does it taste like?

It has an earthy, green taste similar to spinach or matcha.

How much should I take?

Most customers start with one teaspoon per day and adjust based on preference.

How do I order?

Use the WhatsApp order button on this page or contact us by email.

Pure. Organic. Powerful.
